title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: run Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma and other large language models locally with a simple CLI and REST API.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama; chat, embed, pull, and manage models programmatically.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node & browsers; same surface as the Python SDK.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: PyPI package adding Ollama chat, completion & embedding integrations to LangChain.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (chat UI, model management, RAG, multi-user).

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama; chat, embeddings, model ops with fluent builder API.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal retrieval-augmented-generation example using Ollama + Chroma for local docs.

title: ollama-cli-chat
summary: Terminal UI chat powered by Ollama with conversation history and markdown rendering.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that turns any Ollama model into a GitHub Copilot-like inline helper.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-host Discord bot that chats via Ollama; supports slash commands and model swapping.

title: ollama-nvim
summary: Neovim plugin to run and chat with Ollama models inside buffers; complete with keymaps.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU & persistent model storage options.

title: ollama-exporter
summary: Prometheus exporter exposing Ollama runtime metrics (model loaded, tokens/sec, requests).

title: ollama-spring-boot-starter
summary: Spring Boot auto-configuration injecting an Ollama Java client bean for rapid prototyping.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Community Rust crate providing async wrappers over Ollama’s REST endpoints.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET library and CLI for Ollama; chat, pull, list, and delete models from C#.

title: ollama-models
summary: Official registry of Modelfile definitions for Llama 3, Phi-3, Mistral, CodeLlama, etc.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module that spins up Ollama as a service in CI pipelines for testing LLM features.

title: ollama-rag-chatbot
summary: Streamlit chatbot template combining Ollama + LangChain + Chroma for PDF Q&A.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack 2.0 integration offering OllamaGenerator and OllamaChatGenerator components.
